title: Junior Revenue Manager at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners!
